title: Just Some Little Tweaks
description: A mod that adds a few recipes for convenience and Modpack building in mind!
body: I ONLY post my newer mods and mod updates to Modrinth! If you see my mods being uploaded to other websites under my name, THAT IS AN IMPOSTER AND IT HAS BEEN DONE SO WITHOUT MY PERMISSION! PLEASE DO NOT REUPLOAD MY MODS TO OTHER WEBSITES!!! NEVER DOWNLOAD UNOFFICIAL REPOSTS OF MY MODS, AS I DO NOT ENDORSE THEM AND ESPECIALLY BECAUSE THEY COULD BE VIRUSES!!! The ONLY exception are mods hosted on Planet Minecraft with older versions of my mods as that is where I originally started out sharing them! This is just a mod of recipes that I use for my personal modpacks/modded servers, that people may find useful! Some recipes are included with other mods in mind but it's entirely up to you. It adds the recipes for the following: - Zombie Flesh Smelting into Leather - Elytra Recipe (Included with my Elegant Elytras mod in mind to make obtaining Fancier Elytras easier) - Netherite Scrap can be obtained by Smelting Netherite Gear in Blast Furnace (Included with Dungeons Arise in mind, as certain Dungeons have Mob Spawners that spawn with mobs with Netherite Gear that can be obtained-basically meant for Netherite Farming) - Lead Recipe using String ~~and Slime~~ and Only string - Iron, Gold and Diamond Horse Armor Recipes Current Version is for 1.20.1 but will likely make versions for 1.18.2 and possibly 1.16.5
